verses.1:1:1: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
verses.1:1:2: And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters.
verses.1:1:3: And God said, Let there be light: and there was light.
verses.1:1:4: And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness.
verses.1:1:5: And God called the light Day, and the darkness he called Night. And the evening and the morning were the first day.
verses.40:1:1: The book of the generation of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.
verses.40:1:2: And Abraham begat Isaac; and Isaac begat Jacob; and Jacob begat Judas and his brethren;
verses.40:1:3: And Judas begat Phares and Zara of Thamar; and Phares begat Esrom; and Esrom begat Aram;
verses.40:1:4: And Aram begat Aminadab; and Aminadab begat Naasson; and Naasson begat Salmon;
verses.40:1:5: And Salmon begat Booz of Rachab; and Booz begat Obed of Ruth; and Obed begat Jesse;
verses.40:1:6: And Jesse begat David the king; and David the king begat Solomon of her that had been the wife of Urias;
verses.40:1:7: And Solomon begat Roboam; and Roboam begat Abia; and Abia begat Asa;
verses.40:1:8: And Asa begat Josaphat; and Josaphat begat Joram; and Joram begat Ozias;
verses.40:1:9: And Ozias begat Joatham; and Joatham begat Achaz; and Achaz begat Ezekias;
verses.40:1:10: And Ezekias begat Manasses; and Manasses begat Amon; and Amon begat Josias;
verses.40:1:11: And Josias begat Jechonias and his brethren, about the time they were carried away to Babylon:
verses.40:1:12: And after they were brought to Babylon, Jechonias begat Salathiel; and Salathiel begat Zorobabel;
verses.40:1:13: And Zorobabel begat Abiud; and Abiud begat Eliakim; and Eliakim begat Azor;
verses.40:1:14: And Azor begat Sadoc; and Sadoc begat Achim; and Achim begat Eliud;
verses.40:1:15: And Eliud begat Eleazar; and Eleazar begat Matthan; and Matthan begat Jacob;
verses.40:1:16: And Jacob begat Joseph the husband of Mary, of whom was born Jesus, who is called Christ.
verses.40:1:17: So all the generations from Abraham to David are fourteen generations; and from David until the carrying away into Babylon are fourteen generations; and from the carrying away into Babylon unto Christ are fourteen generations.
verses.40:1:18: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was on this wise: When as his mother Mary was espoused to Joseph, before they came together, she was found with child of the Holy Ghost.
verses.40:1:19: Then Joseph her husband, being a just man, and not willing to make her a publick example, was minded to put her away privily.
verses.40:1:20: But while he thought on these things, behold, the angel of the Lord appeared unto him in a dream, saying, Joseph, thou son of David, fear not to take unto thee Mary thy wife: for that which is conceived in her is of the Holy Ghost.
verses.40:1:21: And she shall bring forth a son, and thou shalt call his name JESUS: for he shall save his people from their sins.
verses.40:1:22: Now all this was done, that it might be fulfilled which was spoken of the Lord by the prophet, saying,
verses.40:1:23: Behold, a virgin shall be with child, and shall bring forth a son, and they shall call his name Emmanuel, which being interpreted is, God with us.
verses.40:1:24: Then Joseph being raised from sleep did as the angel of the Lord had bidden him, and took unto him his wife:
verses.40:1:25: And knew her not till she had brought forth her firstborn son: and he called his name JESUS.
verses.43:1:1: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
verses.43:1:2: The same was in the beginning with God.
verses.43:1:3: All things were made by him; and without him was not any thing made that was made.
verses.43:1:4: In him was life; and the life was the light of men.
verses.43:1:5: And the light shineth in darkness; and the darkness comprehended it not.
